message:
feat(tests): add 8 new enrichment integration test suites for core subsystems (~10k lines)

Add enrichment integration tests covering gaps not addressed by existing
test files across 8 core subsystems:

- compression_residual_gate (1747 lines): Copy/Clone, BTreeSet ordering,
  serde, computation methods, ledger ops, gate evaluation, claim surfaces
- global_coherence_checker (1006 lines): Clone independence, serde,
  SeverityScore boundaries, CompositionGraph edges, CoherenceError Display
- hardware_code_layout_gate (1038 lines): Copy/Clone, serde,
  AlignmentStrategy, StallBudget, LayoutPolicy, RollbackGate, PlatformRule
- module_resolver (875 lines): Copy/Clone, serde, resolver registration/
  resolution, policy hooks, host API surface, error codes
- object_model (1833 lines): Copy semantics, Clone independence, serde,
  ObjectHeap APIs, Reflect.apply/construct, for_in_keys, set_property
- parallel_parser (1629 lines): Copy/Clone, serde, RollbackControl,
  ThroughputSample, schedule transcripts, replay envelope, backpressure
- shadow_ablation_engine (1114 lines): Copy/Clone, serde, error paths,
  config validation, engine construction, std::error::Error
- structural_causal_model (1126 lines): Copy/Clone, serde, DAG
  construction/traversal, confounder analysis, backdoor criterion,
  intervention, ATE estimation, attribution decomposition

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
